expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status storage default",
      "description": "As a developer, I want task status persisted with default pending so status exists for every task.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task status persistence supports pending, in progress, and done values.",
        "Existing tasks receive pending as default status value.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_task_status.sql",
        "src/domain/taskStatus.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add shared task status validation type",
      "description": "As a developer, I want shared status validation helpers so backend and UI use same allowed values.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Shared status type and validation helper exported for reuse.",
        "Validation rejects unsupported status values.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/domain/taskStatus.ts",
        "src/lib/validation/taskStatusSchema.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend task status update action",
      "description": "As a user, I want status changes saved through server logic so status updates persist reliably.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Server action updates stored task status using shared validation.",
        "Update action returns updated task payload with status value.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/updateTaskStatus.ts",
        "src/server/repositories/taskRepository.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001",
        "US-002"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show task status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want badge on each task card so I can quickly scan status.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards render pending, in progress, or done badge from status value.",
        "Badge styling stays consistent across status values.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskCard.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/task-status-badge.css"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add inline status control in task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want inline status control in task list so I can change status without leaving list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list status control exposes pending, in progress, and done options.",
        "Selecting status triggers status update action and refreshes task state.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskListRow.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskStatusControl.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-003"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add status filter for task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want filter by status so I can focus on pending, in progress, or done work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list filter options include all, pending, in progress, and done.",
        "Filtering updates visible tasks without breaking existing sort behavior.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskListFilters.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/useFilteredTasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
